title: How Not to Die: Discover the Foods Scientifically Proven to Prevent and Reverse Disease
excerpt: The definitive popular guide to evidence-based plant-based nutrition, showing how a whole-food plant-based diet can prevent, treat, and reverse the fifteen leading causes of death. Features the Daily Dozen framework.
rationale: Root book #3 for nutrition-science. How Not to Die provides the comprehensive practical framework for evidence-based plant-based nutrition, complementing the investigative (Salt Sugar Fat) and biochemical (The Case Against Sugar) approaches with an actionable lifestyle prescription.
